title: Joker’s Influence Spreads
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Marines, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Vergo. The central beat is joker’s influence spreads.
scene: The scene focuses on joker’s influence spreads, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Marines, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Vergo shaping the Punk Hazard conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You have to search for the children!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Those children died in an accident !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Gyahah! That's going too far, commodore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: THEY'RE STILL ALIVE, I KNOW IT...!!

summary: Joker’s Influence Spreads. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
